name: xss-security-lab
description: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Lab - Educational security demo

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n BE,FE,HACKER -c blue,green,red "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix hacker-server"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix hacker-server
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix hacker-server
